name.description: Short, human-readable name of the rule

version.description: Optional version string for the rule (e.g. '1.0.0').

priority.description: Priority of the rule (higher executes earlier if grouped)

condition.description: CEL expression that evaluates to a boolean

sourceQuote.description: The exact verbatim text from the business policy or regulatory document that inspired this rule

sourceDocument.description: Reference to the actual document and version where the sourceQuote originated

onSuccess.description: Action to take when condition evaluates to true

onFailure.description: Action to take when condition evaluates to false
